description_long: This is a brown ceramic cup with a slightly flared rim and a rounded base. The surface has a matte, slightly mottled finish with subtle lighter patches, giving it a handcrafted appearance. A prominent feature is the sculpted frog figure attached to the side of the cup, adding a whimsical and decorative touch. The handle is robust and smoothly integrated into the body, with a gentle curve for comfortable gripping. The interior appears to be the same material and finish as the exterior, suggesting a uniform construction. The cup is solid and sturdy, suitable for holding hot or cold beverages in an urban kitchen or café setting.
description: A brown ceramic cup with a flared rim, matte finish, and a sculpted frog figure on the side, featuring a sturdy curved handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flared rim, curved handle, and the sculpted frog figure attached to the side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the handle's attachment and the frog figure's profile, with the rim and body visible.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the plain surface of the cup, the handle's curve, and no visible decorative elements.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the cup's plain surface and a partial glimpse of the frog figure, with the handle mostly hidden.
